Fixed: TestCaseGrader.verify_canaries now searches only agent_output_path. Removed input_files fallback from base class. SelfTestGrader already had its own override searching only input_files. All 386 tests pass, self-test 18/18 at 3/3/3/3/3.

Fixed: base TestCaseGrader._load_agent_data() no longer falls back to self._expected when no agent JSON is found — returns None instead, causing correctness to score 1. SelfTestGrader override unchanged. All 386 tests pass, self-test 18/18 at 3/3/3/3/3.

Added 8 focused tests in tests/test_grader_evidence.py covering: (1) normal grader canary search scoped to agent output only (bpt.1), (2) normal grader _load_agent_data returns None without agent JSON (bpt.2), (3) SelfTestGrader searches input files for canaries, (4) SelfTestGrader falls back to expected data for correctness. All pass.

Added 18 end-to-end grader regression tests covering: self-test pipeline (_run_self_test), normal grading pipeline (_grade_test_case), CLI entrypoint (main), and over-credit regression. Tests verify correctness fails without agent JSON, canaries require agent-output evidence, malformed JSON degrades gracefully, self-test path still scores 3/3/3/3/3, and batch grading writes aggregate reports.

Decision recorded. V1 registry is a static ScenarioPack dataclass with pack_id, display_name, test_cases, canary_file_keys, emitters, and dependencies. Default generation runs accounting-core only. Unknown packs fail fast. Dependencies are validated and topologically sorted. TC-01–TC-18 output is backward-compatible because the emitter sequence and canary key list are identical.
